scripts.name: Manage Vault
scripts.description: Full vault management — create, edit, and organise vault entries
scripts.help: CAWC Vault Session Manager. Handles course registration and pre-session setup. Launches a full interactive TUI — use its own menus to navigate. Returns here when you exit.

scripts.name: Vault Health
scripts.description: Check vault integrity and surface broken or orphaned entries
scripts.help: Scans the CAWC Obsidian vault for broken wikilinks and orphaned notes. Ignores index files (prefixed _), image links, and stub notes. Outputs a report to the terminal and writes a markdown report to Obsidian at Help/Vault Health Report.md.

scripts.name: Lecture Merge
scripts.description: Merge Panopto lecture recordings into a single clean video
scripts.help: Auto-classifies 3 Panopto .mp4 files by audio and bitrate, normalizes audio to EBU R128 (-16 LUFS), optionally overlays screen recording as PiP, and outputs a named session file. Place 3 .mp4 files in the Video Staging folder before running.

scripts.name: PDF → Text
scripts.description: Extract plain text from one or more PDF files
scripts.help: Converts PDFs to plain text using bundled pymupdf. Layout mode (default) preserves columns and tables; plain mode extracts pure reading-order text. No external dependencies.
